---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new behaviour or an API addition
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

**What's the use case**
<!-- describe the problem first, not the solution -->

**Proposed approach** (optional)
<!-- if you already have a sketch, function signature, a fixture, a
     pseudo-code outline -->

**Why this belongs in promptguard (not halluguard / truthcheck / claimcheck)**
<!-- promptguard is the input-side gate against prompt injection /
     jailbreak attempts. halluguard verifies LLM output against a
     corpus; truthcheck verifies open-web facts; claimcheck
     orchestrates the others. Where does this land? -->

**Bypass repro?**
<!-- if you found a known-bypass injection prompt that defeats the
     current rule pack / classifier, please share it (or say "happy
     to share privately"). -->

**Alternatives considered**
<!-- existing workarounds, third-party libraries, content-policy
     filters, etc. -->
